mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_LOG_LIKE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_LOG_LIKE (ID, MEMBER_ID, LOG_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{memberId}, #{logId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_LOG_LIKE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND LOG_ID = #{logId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LOG_LIKE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND LOG_ID = #{logId}

SELECT TBL.ID AS id, TBL.LOG_TITLE AS logTitle, TBL.VISION_TITLE AS visionTitle, TO_CHAR(TBL.LOG_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS logCreatedAt, TBL.LOG_READ_COUNT AS logReadCount, TBL.LOG_THUMBNAIL_URL AS thumbnailUrl, TBL.LOG_STATUS AS logStatus, TBL.LOG_PROGRESS AS logProgress, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS memberProfileImageUrl, TBC.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LOG_LIKE TLL WHERE TLL.LOG_ID = TBL.ID) AS likeCount FROM TBL_LOG_LIKE TLL JOIN TBL_LOG TBL ON TLL.LOG_ID = TBL.ID JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBL.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID JOIN TBL_CATEGORY TBC ON TBL.CATEGORY_ID = TBC.ID WHERE TLL.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND TBL.LOG_DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY TBL.LOG_CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS LIKE_COUNT, MAX(CASE WHEN MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IS_LIKED FROM TBL_LOG_LIKE WHERE LOG_ID = #{logId}
